problem: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography
mechanism: DNA computing for massively parallel search
hypothesis: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of DNA. DNA computing for massively parallel search directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
